note: FROZEN anon-identity derivation vectors. HKDF-SHA-256, salt 'ministry/anon/v1' at BOTH levels. L1 (per-app secret) is derived at ministry.id from the 16-byte root; L2 (context secret) is derived inside each relying-party app from the L1 branch. Ministry implements L1 only (packages/shared/src/anon-seed-crypto.ts). The SDK implements L2. This file is the single source of truth both sides assert against so the two cannot drift. Changing any value here silently forks every derived identity.

l2.ikm: the L1 secret for deforum:1 above
